name: 暗影步传送
description: 回合开始时传送到预设位置
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; if (!sourcePiece.statusTags) { return { message: '', success: true }; } const shadowStepStatus = sourcePiece.statusTags.find(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (!shadowStepStatus) { return { message: '', success: true }; } if (shadowStepStatus.remainingDuration <= 0) { return { message: '', success: true }; } const targetX = shadowStepStatus.value; const targetY = shadowStepStatus.intensity; const shadowStepSourceId = 'shadow-step-' + sourcePiece.instanceId; const cleanupTileEffects = function() { if (battle.extensions && battle.extensions.tileEffects) { battle.extensions.tileEffects = battle.extensions.tileEffects.filter(function(te) { return !(te.tileType === 'shadow-step' && te.sourceId === shadowStepSourceId); }); } }; const targetTile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === targetX && t.y === targetY); const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetX && p.y === targetY && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { if (targetTile) { targetTile.props.walkable = true; } cleanupTileEffects(); const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的暗影步目标位置已被占用', success: true }; } if (!targetTile) { cleanupTileEffects(); const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的暗影步目标位置已不存在', success: true }; } targetTile.props.walkable = true; cleanupTileEffects(); sourcePiece.x = targetX; sourcePiece.y = targetY; shadowStepStatus.remainingDuration = 0; const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '通过暗影步传送到了(' + targetX + ',' + targetY + ')', success: true }; }
